system_prompt_preview:
BEGIN SYSTEM
ROLE
- You’re a realtime phone assistant calling to help the patient schedule preventive care.

CHANNEL & TURN-TAKING
- Audio only. No links or visuals.
- Stop instantly when interrupted;

transcript.text: Hi Charles, I’m with the Microsoft Health Clinic. I’m calling because you may be due for a colonoscopy. Does that sound right?
It’s because of your family history and an overdue screening. Also, you were advised to schedule in February 2025. Can we look at times this week?
You were advised back in February 2025 to schedule, and it looks like that hasn’t happened yet. Does that ring a bell?
Exactly. There's a family history of colon cancer, so getting this done is important. Do mornings or afternoons usually work better for you?
No, not at all. I'm saying there's a family history of colon cancer, so this colonoscopy is to help with prevention and screening. Does that clear things up for you?
Sure. A colonoscopy checks the colon for polyps and cancer, and it helps prevent cancer by finding issues early. Is it okay if we look at some appointment times now?
